new_translation: Người nông dân nuôi một đàn gia súc trong trang trại.

old_example: The manager shared a cautionary tale about a failed international expansion project from years ago.
new_example: The manager shared a cautionary tale about a failed expansion project.
new_translation: Quản lý đã chia sẻ một câu chuyện cảnh báo về dự án thất bại.

old_example: The company is moving cautiously with its international expansion plans due to current economic uncertainty.
new_example: The company is moving cautiously with its expansion plans.
new_translation: Công ty đang thận trọng với kế hoạch mở rộng.

old_example: The expert provided his financial advice with the caveat that market conditions could change rapidly.
new_example: The expert provided advice with the caveat that conditions could change.
new_translation: Chuyên gia đưa ra lời khuyên với lưu ý rằng điều kiện có thể thay đổi.

old_example: The dentist discovered a small cavity in the patient's tooth during the regular checkup today.
new_example: The dentist discovered a small cavity during the checkup.
new_translation: Nha sĩ đã phát hiện một lỗ sâu nhỏ trong đợt kiểm tra.

old_example: The factory was ordered to cease operations immediately due to severe environmental safety violations.
new_example: The factory was ordered to cease operations immediately.
new_translation: Nhà máy bị yêu cầu ngừng hoạt động ngay lập tức.

old_example: The chest is made of aromatic cedar wood to protect the clothes from moths.
new_example: The chest is made of cedar wood to protect clothes.
new_translation: Chiếc rương làm bằng gỗ tuyết tùng để bảo vệ quần áo.

old_example: The company held a special dinner to celebrate its successful international product launch last week.
new_example: The company held a dinner to celebrate the product launch.
new_translation: Công ty tổ chức bữa tối để kỷ niệm ngày ra mắt sản phẩm.

old_example: The celebrated international architect was hired to design the company's new regional headquarters building.
new_example: The celebrated architect was hired to design the new building.
new_translation: Kiến trúc sư nổi tiếng được thuê để thiết kế tòa nhà mới.

old_example: The grand celebration of the city's anniversary attracted thousands of international visitors yesterday afternoon.
new_example: The celebration of the city's anniversary attracted thousands of visitors.
new_translation: Lễ kỷ niệm ngày thành lập thành phố thu hút hàng ngàn khách.

old_example: The famous international celebrity made a rare public appearance at the luxury jewelry store yesterday.
new_example: The celebrity made a rare public appearance yesterday.
new_translation: Ngôi sao đã có lần xuất hiện hiếm hoi hôm qua.

old_example: She added some chopped celery to the soup to give it a fresh and crunchy texture.
new_example: She added some celery to the soup for texture.
new_translation: Cô ấy đã thêm cần tây vào súp để tạo kết cấu.

old_example: Ancient astronomers spent countless hours observing the movements of celestial bodies to develop accurate calendars and navigation charts.
new_example: Ancient astronomers spent hours observing the movements of celestial bodies.
new_translation: Các nhà thiên văn cổ dành nhiều giờ quan sát các thiên thể.

old_example: The restaurant has a large wine cellar containing several rare and expensive international vintages.
new_example: The restaurant has a large wine cellar with rare vintages.
new_translation: Nhà hàng có hầm rượu lớn với các loại rượu hiếm.

old_example: She has been practicing the cello since she was seven years old and now plays professionally in the regional symphony orchestra.
new_example: She has been practicing the cello since she was seven.
new_translation: Cô đã tập luyện đàn cello từ khi mới 7 tuổi.

old_example: The government conducts a national census every ten years to collect detailed demographic and economic data.
new_example: The government conducts a national census every ten years.
new_translation: Chính phủ thực hiện tổng điều tra dân số mười năm một lần.

old_example: The small crack in the wall is only about two centimeters long and should be easy to repair.
new_example: The crack in the wall is only two centimeters long.
new_translation: Vết nứt trên tường chỉ dài hai xăng-ti-mét.

old_example: The tailor carefully measured the length of the trousers, noting that they needed to be shortened by exactly two centimetres for a perfect fit.
new_example: The tailor shortened the trousers by two centimetres.
new_translation: Thợ may đã rút ngắn chiếc quần đi hai xăng-ti-mét.

old_example: The centrality of the project to the company's long-term growth strategy meant that it received top priority for funding and resources.
new_example: The centrality of the project meant it received top priority.
new_translation: Tầm quan trọng của dự án giúp nó nhận được ưu tiên hàng đầu.

old_example: Many people enjoy a bowl of organic cereal with fresh local fruit for breakfast every morning.
new_example: Many people enjoy a bowl of cereal for breakfast.
new_translation: Nhiều người thích một bát ngũ cốc cho bữa sáng.

old_example: The visiting dignitary was welcomed with a full ceremonial display, including a military parade and a traditional folk dance performance.
new_example: The dignitary was welcomed with a full ceremonial display.
new_translation: Vị khách quý được chào đón bằng một nghi lễ đầy đủ.

old_example: The grand opening ceremony of the new international headquarters was attended by several local dignitaries.
new_example: The opening ceremony was attended by several local dignitaries.
new_translation: Lễ khai trương có sự tham dự của vài vị chức sắc địa phương.

old_example: I will certainly pass your message on to the director as soon as he returns.
new_example: I will pass your message to the director when he returns.
new_translation: Tôi sẽ chuyển tin nhắn của bạn đến giám đốc khi ông ấy về.

old_example: The economic analyst stated with complete certainty that the regional inflation rate would begin to decrease by the beginning of the next fiscal year.
new_example: The analyst stated with certainty that inflation would decrease.
new_translation: Nhà phân tích khẳng định chắc chắn rằng lạm phát sẽ giảm.

old_example: The used car dealer guaranteed that all of the vehicles on the lot were certifiably safe and had passed a rigorous fifty-point inspection.
new_example: The dealer guaranteed that all vehicles were certifiably safe.
new_translation: Đại lý đảm bảo rằng tất cả xe đều an toàn có chứng thực.

old_example: You will receive a professional certificate upon successful completion of the international management training program.
new_example: You will receive a certificate upon completion of the training.
new_translation: Bạn sẽ nhận được chứng chỉ sau khi hoàn thành khóa đào tạo.

old_example: Completing the advanced training course will lead to professional certification in project management, improving your career prospects within the firm.
new_example: Completing the course will lead to professional certification.
new_translation: Hoàn thành khóa học sẽ giúp bạn nhận được chứng chỉ chuyên môn.

old_example: The accountant is a certified professional with several years of experience in international financial reporting.
new_example: The accountant is a certified professional with years of experience.
new_translation: Kế toán viên là một chuyên gia có nhiều năm kinh nghiệm.

old_example: The independent certifier carefully inspected the organic farm to ensure that no prohibited pesticides or fertilizers were being used in the production process.
new_example: The certifier inspected the farm to ensure no prohibited pesticides were used.
new_translation: Người chứng nhận kiểm tra trang trại để đảm bảo không dùng thuốc trừ sâu.

old_example: The organization was hired to certify that the products meet all international safety and quality standards.
new_example: The organization was hired to certify that the products meet standards.
new_translation: Tổ chức được thuê để chứng nhận rằng sản phẩm đáp ứng tiêu chuẩn.

old_example: The sudden cessation of international trade caused significant economic difficulties for several developing countries recently.
new_example: The sudden cessation of trade caused economic difficulties.
new_translation: Việc ngừng giao thương đột ngột đã gây ra khó khăn kinh tế.

old_example: The chairman of the board will be presenting the annual international budget report this afternoon.
new_example: The chairman will present the annual budget report this afternoon.
new_translation: Chủ tịch sẽ trình bày báo cáo ngân sách vào chiều nay.

old_example: Under his successful chairmanship, the company experienced a period of unprecedented growth and profitability.
new_example: Under his chairmanship, the company experienced unprecedented growth.
new_translation: Dưới nhiệm kỳ chủ tịch của ông, công ty đã tăng trưởng chưa từng có.

old_example: Expanding into the international market is a major challenge that requires careful planning and coordination.
new_example: Expanding into the international market is a major challenge.
new_translation: Mở rộng ra thị trường quốc tế là thử thách lớn.

old_example: The local chamber of commerce provides support and resources for small international businesses in the city.
new_example: The chamber of commerce provides support for small businesses.
new_translation: Phòng thương mại cung cấp hỗ trợ cho các doanh nghiệp nhỏ.

old_example: The young athlete managed to become the international tennis champion after winning the final yesterday afternoon.
new_example: The young athlete became the international tennis champion.
new_translation: Vận động viên trẻ đã trở thành nhà vô địch quần vợt quốc tế.
